Name: PLAYER_WEATHERING_TEX_PRESET_PARAM_ST
Description:
Defines the Weathering options for Armored Cores.

Row ID links the Preset to the icon texture in SB_Weathering.dds and SB_Weathering.layout

Row ID + 210801 links the Preset to the FMG name it uses in the menu.

Fields.Name: Paint Peeling Strength
Fields.Description: The strength of the peeling texture to display

Fields.Name: Rust Strength
Fields.Description: The amount of rust to show on metal parts

Fields.Name: Paint Peeling Shininess
Fields.Description: Adjusts the shininess strength of the paint peeling

Fields.Name: Paint Peeling Metalness
Fields.Description: Adjusts the metallic strength of the paint peeling

Fields.Name: Rust Shininess
Fields.Description: Adjusts the shininess strength of rust

Fields.Name: Rust Metalness
Fields.Description: Adjusts the metallic strength of rust
